verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The battle rages on Seems my strength is almost gone The trials overwhelm me 'Til I feel I can't go on But deep within this heart of mine is a peace that gives me rest Knowing You're in full control, I can overcome this test

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I know You're the calm within the storm You're the only peace we have when it seems our life is torn and though our hope may seem lost laying weary hearts beneath the cross Dear Lord, it's good to know deep within this soul You're the calm within the storm You are the calm within the storm

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Discouragement hits hard The devil tries to drop my guard Constantly we worry with the battles on the mind But when with softly-whispered prayer, I claim the victory knowing in Your tender arms the devil has no claim on me
